levels.creator: qalli
levels.description: The hardest of the qalli wavedash levels, except for the currently unrated extreme demon. Just like the others, it requires lots of very fast precise dash orb maneuvers

levels.name: All Things must Fall
levels.creator: MeBomba
levels.description: "All hawks must tuah" we all say in unison

levels.name: Calming Presence
levels.creator: DiddyChud
levels.description: Room based needle level that cycles through a couple different styles. Also the last room randomly becomes blindingly bright for some reason

levels.name: Disco Fever
levels.creator: Orelu
levels.description: First half is jetpack avoidance, second half is vertical speedrun. Surprisingly enough, there is no needle in this level

levels.name: DownWell
levels.creator: MARKMORO
levels.description: Super learny level where you go down. Lots of blind falls, and precise cycle manipulation is needed at the boss. I (Evan) seem to be the only person who likes this level

levels.name: Eternal Aqua Sanctum
levels.creator: Stradpult
levels.description: Slope level that has zero platforms to stand on, meaning you have to get creative with how you boost up and rest on the tip of slopes. Apparently possible without slope boosting somehow

levels.name: Froglights
levels.creator: Aktimoose
levels.description: Verdant nostalgic jump king and Aktimoose's masterpiece. Watch out for the red orb at the very top

levels.name: Girassol
levels.creator: Samamba
levels.description: Introductory TPL-styled level with brute force needle sections and an RNG-based avoidance at the end. Fun fact: Girassol translates to "sunflower" in Brazilian Portuguese

levels.name: Maze Fell Down RIP
levels.creator: iKoty
levels.description: Floating Maze-style Minigame that was made in 2.1 but uploaded in 2.2. Because of this, despite the fact its literally in the platformer mode, it plays like a 2.1 classic minigame. Yes this is confusing

levels.name: Mountain Cat Samurai
levels.creator: koko43
levels.description: Every time you move left or right, it jumps for you. Many parts require some extremely specific, awkward, and janky timings to pass. You'll have to play it to see what I mean

levels.name: pit of 50 trials
levels.creator: EpicLemon99
levels.description: Inspired by The Pit of 100 Trials from Super Paper Mario. This level uses several weird gimmicks in a few rooms, along with generally harder gameplay as it goes

levels.name: Soulbound
levels.creator: Eefy77
levels.description: 30 levels of asymmetric 1-player dual jetpack puzzles. They get much more complicated as you progress, requiring some very odd and unintuitive maneuvers

levels.name: Supreme Triad
levels.creator: vLibra
levels.description: Fight 3 bosses of varying difficulty with many different attack patterns. Each one has unique attacks, some of which are pretty difficult to avoid

levels.name: The Monolith
levels.creator: thejshadow & MoistenedEgg
levels.description: Very dark and gloomy for the first parts using slope gameplay reminiscent of Terminal Heaven, before the last checkpoints throw you into a rather intricate bossfight before you can complete the level

levels.name: WASTING THEY CYCLES
levels.creator: TheRealXFuture
levels.description: Very heavily inspired by Rain World, with a dark industrial atmosphere and cube gameplay with lots of slopes

levels.name: Worlds Hardest Game
levels.creator: Infernal331
levels.description: Remake of an Adobe classic. A lot of the difficulty comes from the hard-to-get-used-to floaty jetpack physics, which make very specific rooms (eg. 18, 28) very difficult

levels.name: 133rd Pink Cloud
levels.creator: FakeHATETAG
levels.description: A deathless low gravity ball level with an onimous feel. You either fluke or you don't

levels.name: DASH KING
levels.creator: Halapeenyo
levels.description: The sequel to the creator's previous Jump King level, this time it is much harder and less forgiving, especially in the final areas

levels.name: Decaying Silo
levels.creator: LunarLeo77
levels.description: Escape a flooding run-down silo as soon as possible. The base gameplay isn't very hard, but you have to be FAST

levels.name: eight sacred moons
levels.creator: zaroren
levels.description: Long room based level split up into 8 different sections, each with their own gimmicks. Red moon is notoriously an insane difficulty spike

levels.name: flesh n bones girl
levels.creator: koko43
levels.description: koko's first 2.2 level, which says more about it than I ever could. Has lots of rooms with varying themes and gimmicks, as well as a John Lemmon bossfight

levels.name: i have heights fear
levels.creator: ArtemkaKlutoy
levels.description: The unique, innovative "gimmick" is excruciatingly slow falling platforms including inconsistent jumps with low gravity squares to disrupt friction, so have fun I guess

levels.name: LAVA OUTRUNNER
levels.creator: MatejWGD
levels.description: A speedrun level similar in style of the Sake levels. You need to hit a lot of awkwardly placed toggle orbs, last quarter is more learny than it first appears

levels.name: Leaping Hazard
levels.creator: YoStarYeahya
levels.description: WHG-like avoidance where you can jump over various hazards. Collect 65 points to win

levels.name: Pit of 100 Trials
levels.creator: robotnipper
levels.description: Paper Mario Thousand Year Door themed needle requiring more endurance than your typical Insane Demon. Watch out for the last 3 checkpoints

levels.name: Plumber Madness
levels.creator: ThiKn
levels.description: Mario level with lots of gimmicks you may recognize. Sort of formatted like a room level, at least until the long jetpack part at the ending

levels.name: Ritual of Calamity
levels.creator: b0bby123
levels.description: Basically just a recreation of the Supreme Calamitas bossfight from the Terraria Calamity Mod (yep its another one of these). The last 10% makes up for most of the difficulty

levels.name: Toxic Tunnels
levels.creator: RealGp0
levels.description: Slow-paced autoscroller featuring cycle-based gameplay and key collecting. Avoid the toxic waste

levels.name: Twisted Reality
levels.creator: NightThemeGMD
levels.description: Essentially a remake of Undertale fangame Twisted Reality by Sky Akiyama. Enjoy the font

levels.name: xNyycts Basement
levels.creator: xNyyct
levels.description: A megacollab room based level that has different creators for each room and contains two bosses at the ending and midpoint of the level

levels.name: 100000 Roentgens
levels.creator: iownfish
levels.description: A radiation-themed autoscroller with a somewhat buggy double jump and various chokepoints in the second half. You best hope you fluke, but no pressure

levels.name: ball that bounces
levels.creator: newSakePlayS
levels.description: Unlike the other rated bouncy ball platformers, this does not feature the rudimentary style from the original game. The gameplay still has numerous chokes splintered across the level, so DON'T CHOKE

levels.name: Chief Needler
levels.creator: Orelu
levels.description: 5 rooms of mini cube needle and 5 more rooms of mini robot needle. Consists of varying themes of decoration and song

levels.name: Delightfall
levels.creator: Chloe
levels.description: Platformer containing a mix of dropper and wavedash gameplay. There are three sections divided into two checkpoints each

levels.name: Dungeon Treasures
levels.creator: Astronaut21
levels.description: Plays like your typical 5-6 moons dungeon level but on steroids

levels.name: Ferrum Frenzy
levels.creator: Xepheron
levels.description: Not to be confused with the classic Extreme Demon. Balancing is said to be comparable to Silent Clubstep

levels.name: Final Impact
levels.creator: btwmag
levels.description: Very well-themed and high-quality level where you have to save everyone. Timing-focused with a double-jump that propels you with even more force than the initial jump, leading to some unqiue-feeling gameplay elements

levels.name: Himu
levels.creator: Splash225 & WatehRY
levels.description: One of the many rated Imu levels. Has an infamously hard last jetpack

levels.name: How to platformer
levels.creator: thearmyants
levels.description: Tutorial level to show off common platformer mechanics (which is mostly mini-robot needle gameplay, unfortunately). May or may not contain 2000 rooms and checkpoints of increasing difficulty

levels.name: I Wanna SPEEDRUN
levels.creator: CeakGD
levels.description: Combine subpar needle and autoscroller and you get… whatever this is

levels.name: Imagine this lvl
levels.creator: ParadoxTI
levels.description: Has several rooms where you have to memorize when and where the obstacles will appear, as well as a Limbo keys moment at the end. The entire level is an olive green color, similar to the Game Boy's screen

levels.name: INTUITION
levels.creator: waterpump
levels.description: Broken up into 9 various segments of extremely learny gameplay, ranging from Simon Says to Asteroids. The last two segments are notably harder than the preceding ones. Beware of moth

levels.name: Mountainous Climb
levels.creator: MatejWGD
levels.description: Slope and needle level very reminiscent of Free Solo by Cejelost, while also adding rotating dash orbs. Got a "balance" update post-rate to "keep it extreme" which obviously didn't work. And of course DON'T CHOKE

levels.name: Nextphase
levels.creator: Doshterhoz
levels.description: Not much to say about it until it got a stupid buffdate that most likely will get reverted. Average platformer balance update

levels.name: Radioactive Reloaded
levels.creator: NDagger
levels.description: Remake of the creator's level "Radioactive", this level has 2x gravity in every single part, making the jetpack annoying as hell to control. The gameplay itself doesn't help either, with lots of stupid maneuvers and gimmicks

levels.name: Storm Front
levels.creator: rtnman
levels.description: Dash orbs galore. It also has a practice save system

levels.name: Tower of Infinity
levels.creator: MadisonYuko
levels.description: Epileptic tower level with IWBTG type gameplay and somewhat similar decoration but with elements of Yuko's own style in the mix

levels.name: Trap Adventure
levels.creator: mariokirby1703
levels.description: This entire level is full of traps that you need to memorize the positions of, similar to the game its directly inspired by. You get 10 lives per run. Do Not Research Creator

levels.name: Walk to the midnight
levels.creator: Anyvix
levels.description: Robot-focused platformer serving as a reimagining of "Dead Of Night" by TMco, featuring longer but fewer rooms, no sound effects, and just as many fixed hitboxes. Mostly no double jump either, except in a couple rooms

levels.name: Withering Gallery
levels.creator: vsowanted
levels.description: A weirdcore room based needle level. Has fluctuated between Insane and Extreme demon over 15 times. Chose Swap Core as its gender

levels.name: Grand Arena Showdown
levels.creator: AstralityAngel
levels.description: 5 minute long survival contest. Every 20 seconds you get 2 random bosses to face out of a list of 28, drawn from other classic levels

levels.name: Maximum Security
levels.creator: Buziris
levels.description: "uhh i know it's an autoscroller with weird gameplay" - Fawxu

levels.name: orbius 3
levels.creator: OWOSI
levels.description: Large scale puzzle level with extremely creative implementations of GD mechanics. My (Evan) personal favorite platformer level

levels.name: Portals of Memory
levels.creator: NinSam
levels.description: The first Platformer memory level, with multiple different rooms. You have a handful of second to look at the overview of each room before all the spikes turn invisible, so you must memorize the path very quickly.

levels.name: Ruol Ue
levels.creator: Redunant
levels.description: It's just a 5 key rhythm game, allegedly not even demon worthy with the correct keybinds

levels.name: Cosmic Curse
levels.creator: LopyLuna
levels.description: Another Terraria-style bossfight level. This time, however, you dont have to walk right up to the boss to hit it, it has 2 phases and has absolutely no animation sprites, so it ends up looking incredibly goofy

levels.name: The Path of Pain
levels.creator: Hevii
levels.description: I think this is a recreation of a Hollow Knight stage, but someone who's actually played the game could correct me here

levels.name: Funk Tower
levels.creator: KingEggplant987
levels.description: Funky tower that you climb. Employs some gimmicks such as slope boosting that might give you trouble

levels.name: Ciphers Trial
levels.creator: DremonD
levels.description: Bossfight where you avoid a bunch of attacks from Bill Cipher

levels.name: ALTERNATE
levels.creator: Jordi6304
levels.description: Room platformer that utilizes the "switching blocks" gimmick; the blocks switch faster than most levels of the same type so watch out

levels.name: DASH MASTER
levels.creator: Xepheron
levels.description: I bet you'll never guess what this level's favorite type of orb is

levels.name: Not Sunspike
levels.creator: TheSac9009
levels.description: Forgiving needle level with old flash game vibes that gets most of its difficulty from its length rather than difficulty of the timings themselves, making this a rather chill experience. Low gravity, and you get to double jump

levels.name: Obscured
levels.creator: NesGMD
levels.description: Auto scroller level that gets harder at the last part, where you do need to be fairly quick with your movements

levels.name: The Citadel
levels.creator: panap
levels.description: Don't fall down. Has a lot of weird gimmicks that might trip you up

levels.name: The Climb
levels.creator: RGBA
levels.description: Jump King level with a lot of slopes and weird structuring

levels.name: Malware Zero
levels.creator: HargChucu
levels.description: JSAB level that gives you three lives. Have we not had enough of these yet?

levels.name: cals birthday quest
levels.creator: DavidConcal
levels.description: Find Cal's birthday candles!! Travel through 5 rooms in this riveting adventure to save his birthday

levels.name: Dash rusH
levels.creator: zenothecheetah
levels.description: 10 rooms where you use 2p controls to rotate a dash orb attached to your player to get yourself through the rooms. Some of the maneuvers can be a little confusing

levels.name: Fish Collector
levels.creator: OliXor
levels.description: Collect my 8 fish (Cube/Robot room based platformer with a few rooms that stand out as harder than others, and minigames to add some fish related fun!)

levels.name: Shape Shifter
levels.creator: Syupa
levels.description: 10 room level where you alternate between 4 shapes to pass certain gates

levels.name: Tears of Denial
levels.creator: MattewGame
levels.description: Super Demon where you fight a lot of small guys and a couple really big guys, and i think it has multiple endings idk just read what viprin wrote about it. Its rating was actually DEMOTED from mythic to legendary

levels.name: trIhard
levels.creator: KingEggplant987
levels.description: Similar to DuAlist by the same creator, this level has you solving puzzles with 1-player duals. The twist? This time you have to pay attention to three icons instead of two

levels.name: Switchscapes
levels.creator: DubbyBall
levels.description: Has three rooms that get progressively harder as they go, with the last one being the hardest by far

levels.name: Funny Icejump StagE
levels.creator: stanstanmansan
levels.description: As the name suggests, every single surface in this level has ice physics. It plays pretty well despite that

levels.name: Tower of hell
levels.creator: thearmyants
levels.description: Climb up 8 floors of randomized rooms of varying difficulty, of which there are about 1000+ combinations of. You have to reach the top within 220 seconds, which adds a lot of difficulty

levels.name: Dashing Adventure
levels.creator: limesplatus
levels.description: Celeste-inspired level that takes the wavedash function, but keeps the aesthetic much closer to Geometry Dash than most other pemons that reference Celeste

levels.name: Fall Facility
levels.creator: DexBoss
levels.description: JTOH inspired level where if you fall, you fall far. The level introduces some neat gimmicks on each floor

levels.name: arachnid tetris
levels.creator: spark
levels.description: Similar to I wanna be the guy where it contains 4 rooms with varying amounts of chokepoints, but with spider and more relaxed timings.

levels.name: SpikeRuins Deception
levels.creator: PurpleGuy99
levels.description: Entirely based around the gimmick of spikes either appearing or disappearing based on your proximity to them, making this much learnier than it first seems

levels.name: Getting Over It
levels.creator: KiwiPenguin
levels.description: Climb up an amalgamation of assets from other levels with a hammer that works most of the time

levels.name: SEVEN SECTORS
levels.creator: Split72
levels.description: Timing based level split into segments based on the decoration and gameplay gimmicks. Sectors 5 and 7 carry a bulk of the difficulty

levels.name: chromaside
levels.creator: qalli
levels.description: Uses the wavedash mechanic with dash orbs to create some incredibly fast click patterns

levels.name: i wanna be tombstone
levels.creator: PelucheCuery
levels.description: Needle level that is very generous with its checkpoints. A couple of the rooms could be genuinely seizure-inducing

levels.name: PAIN CONTROL BUS
levels.creator: TheRealXFuture
levels.description: Atmospheric puzzle level that took way too long to get rated. You'll have to figure this out yourself

levels.name: BOXED
levels.creator: NotAstrald
levels.description: Very early 2.2 room platformer that plays like an old flash game. The player hitbox is somewhat finnicky, especially noticable in rooms 14 & 15 which are significantly harder.

levels.name: Metronome
levels.creator: TestFiles
levels.description: Cycles-based level, where some of the rooms swap the platforms, gravity, or even your gamemode to the beat

levels.name: Otu
levels.creator: CreatorCreepy
levels.description: This is litteraly just osu, nothing else to really note

levels.name: Intervanmisse
levels.creator: walter22gd
levels.description: Brute force robot needle level with some cozy jungle-themed decoration. The creator also likes to randomly buff or nerf the level depending on his mood

levels.name: Logodomy
levels.creator: TheMilkCat
levels.description: it's... it's... it's...        grippy!

levels.name: Gravitile
levels.creator: GHHH
levels.description: Consists of custom orbs that let you control low gravity squares using jetpack for a limited time

levels.name: Firefrost cavern
levels.creator: NeknutiS
levels.description: Mario-esque platformer with ice and lava. Don't catch hyperthermia

levels.name: BOSS FIGHT ADVANCED
levels.creator: iKoty
levels.description: RNG boss arena where you fight Yord, Kek, and the fishes. Controversial winner of YoReid Plat CC1

levels.name: The Mineshaft
levels.creator: Adriot
levels.description: Official sequel to The Submarine but not nearly as long. Instead of being themed around the ocean, it's themed underground

levels.name: Avalon Chronicles
levels.creator: vLibra
levels.description: Open world adventure game that allows you to travel between different islands and unlocked different abilities to counteract certain environmental factors

levels.name: Beat Ninja
levels.creator: Rom1o
levels.description: Rhythm minigame containing 5 different songs of varying difficulties

levels.name: Brick Climbing
levels.creator: Trulex750
levels.description: Timing based cube level that has midair readjustments and toggle orbs to disable death berriers

levels.name: dilapidated ascent
levels.creator: towered2
levels.description: Climb a spiky tower with a size changing gimmick. Don't choke

levels.name: Francis
levels.creator: zephlin
levels.description: "Disliked Insane Demon" Replacement after ICE Carbon Zust quit the job. Silly troll level that makes about as much sense as youd expect

levels.name: GD Tower Tiny Square
levels.creator: liamiamliam
levels.description: Recreation of the game "Big Tower Tiny Square" in GD, which features lots of checkpoints but also lots of obstacles in every one of them. This  all comes to a crux when you reach the top and retrieve your pineapple

levels.name: Grappling Hook
levels.creator: WDablioW
levels.description: Take a wild guess what this levels gimmick is (also theres a speedrun part at the end)

levels.name: pandeMEOWium
levels.creator: UserNaPerson
levels.description: meow

levels.name: the last climb
levels.creator: Danieliusmic
levels.description: Robot foddian with lots of slopes. Watch out for the last gap jump.

levels.name: The Submarine
levels.creator: Adriot
levels.description: An openworld game akin to Avalon Chronicles and Sunless City. Move a submarine to gain items, craft tools and fight bosses.

levels.name: Voltstorm Summit
levels.creator: TNTking531
levels.description: Entirely robot level heavily inspired by Celeste. Features a double jump gimmick, making for some tricky midair jumps

levels.name: worlds hardest game
levels.creator: purpledeni
levels.description: Another remake of the flash game. This time, however, its only 10 custom rooms, with new controls to go along with it. Room 8 is insanely hard, carrying almost all of the level's difficulty

levels.name: 2imu
levels.creator: Moonnix
levels.description: Imu level featuring a Mary Poppins gimmick, similar to the one in their previous rated level. And it has a deathless coin

levels.name: Evernight
levels.creator: Electro325
levels.description: This level mixes Celeste-inspired visuals with qalli-inspired dash orb gameplay, which ends up being a combination that works very well

levels.name: Heavenly Canopy
levels.creator: iownfish
levels.description: Low gravity cube level splintered with dash orbs and spider orbs. Try not to choke at the end of room 3.

levels.name: rotten terror
levels.creator: 204L
levels.description: Calamity bossfight that takes exact reference from the Calamity mod

levels.name: Theideakid fightlist
levels.creator: theideakid
levels.description: Great Arena Showdown on trollface crashout galaxy gas

levels.name: Deadramino
levels.creator: ParadoxTI
levels.description: A memory avoidance style level using tetris pieces as a medium. Dodge the oncoming tetris pieces and try not to get buried under them.

levels.name: Molten Dash
levels.creator: MeBomba
levels.description: They Turned MAGMA BOUND Into A PLATFORMER

levels.name: Vincent
levels.creator: ComodoQc
levels.description: Basically your typical No ob style jetpack autoscroller but much easier than any of No obs levels, very easy to choke the end
